name: swupdate-lang
description: SWUpdate sw-description language support with completion and validation

swupdateServer.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the language server.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run compile && npm run bundle
scripts.version: node scripts/sync-versions.js && git add client/package.json server/package.json README.md
scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ..
scripts.install:local: npm run compile && npm run bundle && npx @vscode/vsce package --no-yarn --out swupdate-lang.vsix && code --install-extension swupdate-lang.vsix && code-insiders --install-extension swupdate-lang.vsix
